parts.summary: Reads a rubric, gathers evidence, resolves measured + classified indicators, scores axes with a fixed formula, renders text/md/json/html reports. Deterministic, no API key.

The measurement standard as data: manifest plus one axis.yaml per axis (poles, indicators, weights, signals). All scoring policy lives here; the engine embeds none. Follows measurement-standard semver.

parts.display_name: Claude Code / Gemini / Codex plugin and skill
parts.summary: Distribution surface. The run skill drives the engine via the atlas.sh launcher (cached venv bootstrap, arg forwarding) and its CLI contract. Contains no scoring logic; the host agent answers the classified questions.

integration_points.details: atlas.sh bootstraps venv and forwards to agentic-atlas; skill uses questions, profile --answers, --repo-root
supplied classified answers validated by the engine (value in allowed set, quote verbatim in corpus)
spec.load_rubric reads + jsonschema-validates rubric.yaml and axes/<id>/axis.yaml
docs.sync regenerates each axis README scoring block; make docs-check fails on drift
